work.name: MetaCorp Agency

highlights: Built and optimized Backend systems for high-traffic Web3 applications using Node.js, MongoDB, and GraphQL.

work.name: Waared
highlights: Led the seamless migration of logistics systems across servers, maintaining zero downtime and full data integrity.
Designed and implemented RESTful APIs for logistics platforms using Django, enhancing shipment tracking by 25%.
Designed and implemented a Celery and Redis-based messaging queue, improving system reliability and reducing email notification delays by 30%.
Automated invoicing workflows, reducing manual workloads by 40% and cutting errors by 95%.
Implemented PostgreSQL backup systems, ensuring rapid recovery and 99.9% data uptime.
Handled escalations from Customer Success, resolving complex technical issues and reducing customer-reported incidents
Tech stack: Django, PostgreSQL, Nginx, Celery, RabbitMQ, Docker, Jenkins, and Google APIs.
